message:
fix: custom agents inherit Session/Tmux from preset + rig add/adopt fail-fast on identity beads

Fix-merge of community PRs #2993 and #2995 (DreadPirateRobertz):

1. fillRuntimeDefaults now auto-fills Session and Tmux from the matched
   preset when a custom agent's Command matches a known preset (e.g.,
   claude). This fixes WaitForRuntimeReady returning immediately when
   rc.Tmux is nil, causing startup beacons to fire before Claude loads.

2. gt rig add and gt rig adopt now return errors on identity bead creation
   failure instead of printing a warning and continuing. Transient Dolt
   failures during setup are surfaced immediately with a hint to run
   gt upgrade.

Closes #2993, closes #2995. Fixes gt-7z76.

Co-Authored-By: deckard <cdeal@mines.edu>
Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
